ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_generation" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy generation record */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant generating the energy */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the energy generation */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the energy generation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the energy generation */,
  "generation_gwh" REAL /* Amount of energy generated in GWh */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "plant_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the plant during the energy generation period */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions affecting energy generation */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used for energy generation */,
  "renewable_source" TEXT /* Indicates if the energy source is renewable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_generation_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "plant_name" TEXT /* Name of the plant */,
  "plant_type" TEXT /* Type of the plant (e.g., coal, nuclear, hydro, wind, solar) */,
  "capacity_mw" INTEGER /* Capacity of the plant in MW */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the plant (e.g., operational, under maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "commission_date" TEXT /* Date when the plant was commissioned */,
  "decommission_date" TEXT /* Date when the plant was decommissioned */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the plant (latitude, longitude) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the plant's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the plant's location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Complete address of the plant */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the plant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the plant */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees at the plant */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_due" TEXT /* Date when the next inspection is due */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any certifications the plant holds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant undergoing maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency, major overhaul) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of completion for the maintenance activity */,
  "actual_completion_date" TEXT /* Actual date of completion for the maintenance activity */,
  "next_scheduled_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "assigned_technician" TEXT /* Name or ID of the technician assigned to the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_maintenance_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_efficiency" (
  "efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each efficiency record */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the efficiency data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the efficiency data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the efficiency data */,
  "efficiency_percentage" REAL /* Efficiency percentage of the plant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "efficiency_trend" TEXT /* Trend of efficiency over time */,
  "efficiency_factors" TEXT /* Factors affecting efficiency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_efficiency_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance data */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the performance data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance data */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the plant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "performance_trend" TEXT /* Trend of performance over time */,
  "performance_factors" TEXT /* Factors affecting performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_performance_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., plant manager, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, report) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of the user during access */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant the document is related to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., maintenance logs, operational manuals) */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document */,
  "document_version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the document */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last modified the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_documents_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of the incident (e.g., equipment failure, safety violation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Status of the incident */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User ID of the person assigned to handle the incident */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was resolved */,
  "preventive_measures" TEXT /* Preventive measures taken to avoid similar incidents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_incidents_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_incidents_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant being inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of the inspection (e.g., safety, regulatory compliance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the inspection findings */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "inspection_status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* User ID of the person assigned to conduct the inspection */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if follow-up actions are required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date when follow-up actions are due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_inspections_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_inspections_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant the report is related to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who approved the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was approved */,
  "distribution_list" TEXT /* List of users or departments to which the report is distributed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_reports_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)
